title: Less Icons
description: A resorcepack that remove the extra armor/food icons from the Icons resorcepack to make it more compatible with modpacks
body:
![A gif showing how the resorcepack changes the tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ba94d474f7c975373747a444b5ecfdd5b0d497.gif)
# Less Icons
A resorcepack that removes the armor icons/food icons from the tooltip while using the Icons Resorcepack as to only have one saturation/hunger tooltip while using another mod like [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
# Only modifies en-us, meaning only English works!
